description:
You are a DevOps engineer who has been asked to quickly determine how many times the application printed the
    word “ERROR” and to save those exact error lines for later analysis.

    Current system state:
    • The log file is located at /home/user/app/logs/app.log.  
    • The directory /home/user/app/logs already exists and is writable by the current user.  
    • The log file is encoded in UTF-8 and uses Unix (LF) line endings.

    What you must do:
    1. Use ONE single shell command (pipeline allowed, but everything must be typed on a single command line) to:
       a. Extract every line that contains the exact, case-sensitive string ERROR from /home/user/app/logs/app.log.
       b. Preserve the original order of those lines.
       c. Write only those lines to a new file called /home/user/app/logs/error_summary.log.
       d. Print to STDOUT the total number of lines written, *and nothing else* (no additional words, spaces, or
          blank lines). The output should therefore look exactly like this example (for three error lines):

          3⏎        ← an ASCII “3” followed by a single newline (LF)

    2. Do not modify any other files or create additional files anywhere else.
    3. Ensure that /home/user/app/logs/error_summary.log ends with a trailing newline and uses Unix LF endings.

    Automated checks:
    • The file /home/user/app/logs/error_summary.log must exist.
    • It must contain **only** the ERROR lines from /home/user/app/logs/app.log, in their original order, each ending
      with a single LF and no extra blank line at the end.
    • Your command’s STDOUT must consist of exactly one line containing only the integer count of extracted lines
      followed by a single LF.
truth:
Existing file before the task starts:
    Path: /home/user/app/logs/app.log
    Contents (Unix LF endings, final newline present):
2023-08-20 11:37:02 INFO Starting service
2023-08-20 11:37:05 WARN Config file not found, using defaults
2023-08-20 11:37:10 ERROR Failed to connect to database
2023-08-20 11:37:12 INFO Retrying connection
2023-08-20 11:37:15 ERROR Failed to connect to database
2023-08-20 11:37:18 INFO Giving up after 3 retries
2023-08-20 11:37:20 ERROR Service terminated unexpectedly
2023-08-20 11:37:22 INFO Shutdown complete
    (end of file)

    Expected file created by the agent:
    Path: /home/user/app/logs/error_summary.log
    Contents (Unix LF endings, final newline present):
2023-08-20 11:37:10 ERROR Failed to connect to database
2023-08-20 11:37:15 ERROR Failed to connect to database
2023-08-20 11:37:20 ERROR Service terminated unexpectedly
    (end of file)

    Expected STDOUT produced by the agent’s single command (exact match, including newline):
3\n
name: task_000000_e086522d
